zh.lifeSummary: 當Mechthild von Nassau於1280年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 德根多福奧分格納斯奧時，她的父親Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans25歲，母親Imagina von Isenburg Limburg25歲。她於1294年9月1日與Rudolf I von der Pfalz結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1323年6月19日在德國巴登-爾特波格海德爾格享年43歲，埋葬在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 威斯巴登威斯巴登可拉倫塔爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mechthild von Nassau于1280年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 德根多福奧分格納斯奧时，她的父亲Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans25岁，母亲Imagina von Isenburg Limburg25岁。她于1294年9月1日与Rudolf I von der Pfalz结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1323年6月19日在德国巴登-爾特波格海德爾格享年43岁，埋葬在德国福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 威斯巴登威斯巴登可拉倫塔爾。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Nassau
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, Dutch, and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Nassau, formerly the seat of an independent duchy. The placename derives from Old High German naz ‘damp, wet’ + ouwa ‘water meadow’.

History: The royal house of Nassau traces its descent from Dudo, Count of Lauenburg, who flourished between 1093 and 1117. His family acquired the county of Nassau in the 12th century. Prince Willem van Oranje-Nassau, otherwise known as William the Silent (1533–84), was the leader of the Dutch revolt against Spain in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Mechthild
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Mechthild von Nassau was born in 1280, in Nassau, Offenberg, Deggendorf, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans, was 25 and her mother, Imagina von Isenburg Limburg, was 25. She married Rudolf I von der Pfalz on 1 September 1294. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 19 June 1323, in Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 43, and was buried in Klarenthal, Wiesbaden, Wiesbaden, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mechthild von Nassau est née en 1280, à Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Imagina von Isenburg Limburg, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Rudolf I von der Pfalz le 1 septembre 1294. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 19 juin 1323, à Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Klarenthal, Wiesbaden, Kreis Wiesbaden, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mechthild von Nassau 1280 in Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans 25 und ihre Mutter Imagina von Isenburg Limburg 25. Sie hat am 1. September 1294 Rudolf I von der Pfalz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 19. Juni 1323 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland und wurde in Klarenthal, Wiesbaden, Kreis Wiesbaden, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mechthild von Nassau è nata il nel 1280 nel Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Imagina von Isenburg Limburg, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Rudolf I von der Pfalz il 1 settembre 1294. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 giugno 1323, nel Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Klarenthal, Wiesbaden, Kreis Wiesbaden, Hessen-Nassau, Freistaat Preußen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Mechthild von Nassauが1280年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス デグジェンドルフオフエンバーグナッサウで生まれた時，父Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romansは25歳，母Imagina von Isenburg Limburgは25歳であった。1294年9月1日にRudolf I von der Pfalzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1323年6月19日にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグヘイデルバーグで43歳で死去し，ドイツフレイスタアト プレウssンヘセン-ナッサウクレイス ウィエスバデンウィエスバデンクラーエンサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mechthild von Nassau(이)가 1280년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 디겐도르프 펜버그 나소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Imagina von Isenburg Limburg(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1294년 9월 1일 Rudolf I von der Pfalz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1323년 6월 19일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 헤이들버그에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레이스타앳 프레우ss 헤센-나소 크레이스 위스바든 위스바든 클래렌솔에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mechthild von Nassau nasceu em 1280, em Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Imagina von Isenburg Limburg, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Rudolf I von der Pfalz em 1 de setembro de 1294. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 19 de junho de 1323, em Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Klarenthal, Wiesbaden, Kreis Wiesbaden, Hessen-Nassau, Freistaat Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.Wolfratshausen, Bad Tolz-Wolfratshausen,: волфрацхаусен, ландкрис бад тoлз-волфрацхаусен, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mechthild von Nassau родилась в 1280 г. в местности нассау, оффенбирг, ландкрис дегендорф, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Imagina von Isenburg Limburg, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rudolf I von der Pfalz 1 сентября 1294 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 19 июня 1323 г. в местности хиделбирг, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности кларентэл, виесбаден, крис виесбаден, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mechthild von Nassau nació en 1280, en Nassau, Offenberg, Landkreis Deggendorf, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Adolf Count of Nassau King of the Romans, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Imagina von Isenburg Limburg, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Rudolf I von der Pfalz el 1 de septiembre de 1294. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de junio de 1323, en Heidelberg, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Klarenthal, Wiesbaden, Kreis Wiesbaden, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania.
